username.description: HiBob service-user id, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username.

password.description: HiBob service-user token, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: HiBob API base URL: https://api.hibob.com/v1 (production) or https://api.sandbox.hibob.com/v1 (sandbox). This bundle requires the full URL directly since the engine has no config-derivation mechanism for base URLs (see docs.md Known limits).
